relationships: ber:Yanni yesεa mraw n tmikin aya segmi i d-yuɣal s axxam
ber:Yanni mazal-as kumraw n tmikin akken ad d-yaweḍ
ber:Asakal yettɣimi kumraw semmuset n tmikin akken ad yaweḍ
ber:Asakal yekkat kumraw semmuset n tmikin akken ad yaweḍ
ber:Tamacint-nni ad teqleɛ seg-a ɣef simraw-sḍis n tmikin
ber:Yanni yella yettceyyiε-as asamas i Skura yal semmuset n tmikin
ber:Tamacint ad teqleɛ seg-a ɣef simraw-tẓa n tmikin
